body:
Opus review of b303efb.

IMPLEMENTATION: resolver_mutation_docs.go:34 DocumentWrite loads config via config.LoadWithWorkingDir, resolves library path, validates path traversal (filepath.Clean rejects ..), MkdirAll parent, os.WriteFile, rebuilds docgraph via BuildGraphWithConfig, looks up by PathToID. Falls back to minimal Document record if file lacks DDx frontmatter (graceful: file IS written, response is sparse).

SHAPE NOTE: does NOT use s.libraryPath() from Server struct nor existing handleWriteDocument REST handler — re-implements path resolution. Functionally equivalent. Shape debt captured in refactor bead ddx-7e2f2cb9.

TEST COVERAGE: graphql_mutation_docs_test.go (95 lines) has success + path-traversal rejection, both via real handler.

VERDICT: ACCEPT.
summary: ACCEPT: documentWrite implementation writes real files via config.LoadWithWorkingDir + library path resolution, path-traversal rejection, tests via real handler.
